title: Autoplay chainsaw audio on homepage, add Camp Riley (Coming 2027) show with AI image, and replace Grave Danger Dance image with Undead Dance Party

requirements.text: Ensure the homepage attempts to autoplay the looping chainsaw background audio on initial page load, and if browser autoplay restrictions block playback, the site must remain fully usable while presenting a non-blocking way to start audio via a user gesture (e.g., existing header sound controls).

quotes: Add I hear chainsaws sound effects in homepage don’t let the page block it

acceptanceCriteria: On a fresh load with default sound preferences, the app attempts to start /assets/audio/chainsaw-loop.mp3 automatically.
If autoplay is blocked by the browser, the page still renders and navigation/scrolling works normally (no blocking modal or full-screen gate).
When the user clicks the existing "Enable sound" control, playback starts successfully (chainsaw preferred; fallback allowed if needed).
Audio loops continuously once started and respects the saved volume preference.

requirements.text: Add a new show entry named "Camp Riley" to the shows list, marked as a kid show "Coming 2027", with an original, cool English description generated by the app build (no placeholder text).

quotes: add a new show call Camp Riley kid show coming 2027 add cool description for it
Yes generate camp Riley kid show description yourself.

acceptanceCriteria: "Camp Riley" appears in the Live Shows section alongside existing shows.
The description is in English, reads as a kid-friendly spooky/fun teaser, and clearly indicates it is Coming 2027.
No TypeScript errors occur from the added show entry (e.g., required fields match existing show objects).

requirements.text: Wire an AI-generated image for the new "Camp Riley" show into the existing generatedImages mapping so it renders in the show card.

quotes: add cool description for it and a ai generated image

acceptanceCriteria: A new image file exists under frontend/public/assets/generated with the specified filename.
frontend/src/content/generatedImages.ts includes a shows mapping entry for "Camp Riley" that points to the new asset path.
The Camp Riley show card displays the image without runtime errors (image loads successfully).

requirements.text: Replace the existing "Grave danger dace" scare zone image with an AI-generated "Undead Dance Party" image by updating the generated image mapping used by the Scare Zones section.

quotes: change the grave danger dace scare zone image to a undead dance party
Yes replace the old Grave danger dace scares zone image

acceptanceCriteria: A new image file exists under frontend/public/assets/generated with the specified filename.
frontend/src/content/generatedImages.ts is updated so the scareZones entry for "Grave danger dace" points to the new undead dance party asset path.
The Scare Zones section renders the "Grave danger dace" card using the new image (no broken image).

constraints: Do not edit files under frontend/src/components/ui (read-only UI components).

Do not edit immutable hook entrypoints listed in SYSTEM_CONTEXT (frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.tsx, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx).
Keep all backend logic within the existing single Motoko actor (backend/main.mo) if backend changes become necessary; otherwise, prefer frontend-only changes for this request.
nonGoals: Do not add new authentication methods beyond existing Internet Identity integration.
Do not introduce new backend CMS/content schemas unless strictly required to satisfy the visible homepage/shows/scare-zones updates.
Do not add third-party audio/image hosting; use static assets in the frontend public folder.

required: Kid-friendly spooky camp at night illustration with lanterns, friendly cartoon monsters, and cozy cabins (show-camp-riley.dim_1400x900.jpg)
Neon-lit graveyard dance party illustration with undead skeletons dancing, glowing tombstones, fog, and disco lights (zone-undead-dance-party.dim_1400x900.jpg)
